# Greasy Fork Sync

Greasy Fork is the canonical public release for this project.

## Manual sync process

1. Update `paywall-bypass.user.js` locally.
2. Test the script in a userscript manager.
3. Commit the change in Git and push to GitHub.
4. Copy the updated script into Greasy Fork, or use Greasy Fork's GitHub sync feature if configured.
5. Confirm that the published Greasy Fork version and the GitHub `main` branch match.

## Recommended publish order

1. Make and test the change locally.
2. Push the commit to GitHub.
3. Publish the same script contents on Greasy Fork.
4. Update `CHANGELOG.md` and release notes if the version changed.

## Canonical links

- Greasy Fork page: https://greasyfork.org/en/scripts/495817-paywall-bypass-script-12ft-io-google-cache-paywallbuster-com
- Greasy Fork feedback: https://greasyfork.org/en/scripts/495817-paywall-bypass-script-12ft-io-google-cache-paywallbuster-com/feedback
